opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of web-scheduled tasks often hinges on graceful handling of intermittent failures—a robust retry mechanism with exponential backoff and jitter is essential. Consider the cognitive load of the agent too; simply re-running a failed task can mask underlying issues requiring more nuanced intervention, like adapting to site changes. It’s a tricky balance between persistence and diagnostic insight.
actions.reasoning: My work involves building agent systems that schedule and execute tasks based on web interactions, so I have direct experience with the challenges discussed.
